definition: To make something harmful less severe.
example: Trees planted near streams mitigate flooding.

definition: A large region with similar climate, plants, and animals.
example: The taiga is a cold forest biome.

definition: Delay between a request and a response, especially in networks.
example: Gamers notice latency when pings spike.

definition: Planning training in phases to peak at the right time.
example: Coaches use periodization before championship season.

definition: Carbohydrates, fats, and proteins—the body’s main fuel types.
